innovation_claims.manuscript_claim: Illumination-trust spatial FWI update gate for salt-model velocity updating.
innovation_claims.novelty_position: Converts weak global FWI recovery into a spatial update-selection method by accepting updates only inside illumination-trusted zones.
innovation_claims.required_evidence: FWI misfit reduction, MAE/RMSE, edge MAE, candidate alpha(x,z) gates, selected gate, and update-trust frontier.
innovation_claims.claim_boundary: Supports SEG/Salt benchmark update selection, not direct field-data deployment without proxy trust metrics.

innovation_claims.manuscript_claim: Quality-gated FWI-to-RTM validation after update selection.
innovation_claims.novelty_position: Uses model and image gates to prevent harmful FWI updates from entering RTM interpretation.
innovation_claims.required_evidence: Global update-scale scan, RTM before/after metrics, target-zone diagnostics, and conservative claim boundary.
innovation_claims.claim_boundary: Supports conservative velocity-update screening, not high-resolution FWI velocity recovery.

innovation_claims.manuscript_claim: Target-zone illumination, RTM-response, and FWI-update energy diagnostics.
innovation_claims.novelty_position: Uses salt-top, salt-flank, and subsalt masks to evaluate whether updates and RTM response occur where interpretation needs them.
innovation_claims.required_evidence: Source-receiver illumination, low-illumination fraction, RTM response, full update energy, damped update energy.
innovation_claims.claim_boundary: Shows the subsalt target remains weakly illuminated and almost unupdated; it does not claim solved subsalt imaging.

innovation_claims.manuscript_claim: Explicit separation of RTM image normalization and FWI gradient preconditioning.
innovation_claims.novelty_position: Prevents the common over-claim that better RTM display normalization proves better FWI inversion.
innovation_claims.required_evidence: Source-normalized, source-receiver-normalized, Laplacian, receiver illumination, correlation and low-illumination metrics.
innovation_claims.claim_boundary: Supports imaging-condition interpretation; FWI preconditioning remains a separate ablation result.

innovation_claims.manuscript_claim: Negative-result-aware local FWI ablation as supporting evidence.
innovation_claims.novelty_position: Uses a controlled small salt window to show adaptive line search dominates the current lightweight illumination preconditioner.
innovation_claims.required_evidence: Baseline, illumination-preconditioned, epsilon scan, max-update scan, line search, and adaptive extended line-search reductions.
innovation_claims.claim_boundary: Positions illumination preconditioning as a limitation and future method target, not as the current main improvement.

figure_alt_text.title: Literature-guided FWI-RTM synthesis and claim boundary
figure_alt_text.alt_text: Four-panel summary linking literature needs to implemented FWI-RTM quality gates, update-scale selection, evidence strength, and conservative publishable claims.

figure_alt_text.title: RTM validation before and after quality-gated FWI updating
figure_alt_text.alt_text: RTM images from true, initial, and damped FWI velocities are compared with an after-minus-before panel; the damped update gives only a slight filtered RMSE improvement.

figure_alt_text.title: Full-aperture RTM imaging-condition diagnostics
figure_alt_text.alt_text: Source-normalized, source-receiver-normalized, Laplacian source-normalized, and receiver-illumination panels show how imaging conditions change salt-model RTM expression.

figure_alt_text.title: Illumination-trust spatial FWI update gate
figure_alt_text.alt_text: A spatial alpha map, candidate quality frontier, and error-map comparison show that illumination-trust gating improves MAE, RMSE, and edge MAE while avoiding global-update edge degradation.

figure_alt_text.title: Target-zone illumination, RTM response, and FWI update diagnostics
figure_alt_text.alt_text: Salt-top, salt-flank, and subsalt masks are compared against illumination, RTM response, and FWI update energy, showing weak subsalt response and negligible subsalt updates.
